nasb.text: So he was reasoning in the synagogue with the Jews and the God-fearing Gentiles, and in the market place every day with those who happened to be present.

esv.text: So he reasoned in the synagogue with the Jews and the devout persons, and in the marketplace every day with those who happened to be there.

cnv.text: 於是在會堂裡，同猶太人和虔誠的人辯論；並且天天在市中心和所遇見的人辯論。

ccb.text: 于是，他在会堂跟犹太人和虔诚的外族人辩论，每天在广场上跟遇见的人辩论。

csbs.text: 于是他在会堂里向犹太人以及那些敬神的人讲论，每天又向在街市上遇见的人讲论。
